title: Shrimad Bhagwat Katha Acharyaji
desc: Acharyaji narrates the Shrimad Bhagwat Katha with devotion and clarity, guiding viewers through spiritual stories, life lessons, and cultural insights, making complex teachings accessible to all.

title: Har Har Bhakti
desc: A religious leader speaks on holy scriptures, guiding devotees toward righteousness and urging them to follow a virtuous path for spiritual growth and moral living.

title: Choti Bahu
desc: Radhika, a devoted Krishna follower, deeply loves Dev, but his family arranges his marriage to Barkha, shattering her dreams and testing her devotion.
